name: standards-refresh.sh crawl never follows a link off the seed's host regardless of strategy
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r34-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/docs $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/docs/index.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Stay on the published host

Crawlers must remain on the host that published the seed document.

elsewhere HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; M=$(ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/crawls/"r34-src-*.jsonl | head -1); grep -q 'pages_fetched=1' e.err && grep -q 'off-host' "$M" && echo off-host-links-never-followed 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
